title: SchemaMigrationLedger
description: config/schema-migrations.yaml. One entry per SCHEMA_VERSION bump, declaring how much of the graph that version invalidates for clone-based migrations. Appended by `mise schema:bump`; humans may only widen an entry, never narrow it below the detected drift.

scope.description: '*' = full rebuild; 'sdlc' = SDLC-sourced tables (optionally narrowed by entities); 'code' = code-graph tables.

entities.description: SDLC entity names or relationship kinds narrowing a 'sdlc' scope. Only valid with scope 'sdlc'.
